title: CNBC Daily Open: Markets hold breath as Trump's Iran deadline nears
summary_full: Oil prices rose again as President Donald Trump stepped up his threats against Iran if Tehran does not come to a deal on the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Oil prices rose again as President Donald Trump stepped up his threats against Iran if Tehran does not come to a deal on the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: neutral
